data.title: Distributed System Design
data.description: Apple employs a highly distributed system architecture to manage global traffic.
data.technical_spec: Microservices, load balancers, globally distributed data centers.

data.title: High Availability and Redundancy
data.description: Ensures minimal downtime through redundancy and failover systems.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers, automated failover, redundancy protocols.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Supports peak demand fluctuations with scalable cloud solutions.
data.technical_spec: AWS, Azure integration, elastic load balancing.

data.title: API Gateway Management
data.description: Centralized management of APIs for consistency and scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDNs to improve site load times globally.
